articles.title: Elizabeth Warren compares 'bogus' crypto to 'legitimate' CBDCs in senate hearing
articles.description: "The threats posed by crypto show that congress and federal regulators can't continue to hide out, hoping crypto will go away," said the Massachusetts senator.

articles.title: Elizabeth Warren Trashes Bitcoin, Dogecoin and Other Crypto in Senate Hearing

articles.title: Fetch.ai and Iota announce new data-sharing IOT partnership
articles.description: “The fundamental goal of this collaboration is to enable granular control over data and to reduce the reliance on centralized systems that take advantage of data,” said Humayun Sheikh, CEO of Fetch.ai.

articles.title: Ethereum’s Average Transaction Fee Drops to Mid-2020 Levels
articles.description: Ethereum’s average gas fee has dropped to levels last seen in mid-2020 It now costs roughly 26.9 GWEI to complete an Ethereum transaction Ethereum’s daily transaction count has also dropped to mid-2020 levels Ethereum miner revenue has also reached a 3 month low All these metrics point towards a drop in network activity on Ethereum that could lead to ETH losing value The average gas fee on the...

articles.title: Ripple Lawyers Say SEC Citing Irrelevant Evidence in XRP Lawsuit
articles.description: Lawyers for Ripple say that recent evidence cited against the San Francisco-based payments company by the U.S Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is wholly irrelevant and misleading. The SEC accuses Ripple of unlawfully selling its native XRP token as an unregistered security and alleges that XRP remains one today. The SEC has cited over 70 […]

articles.title: Dfinity founder takes aim at Ethereum’s complex layer-two solutions
articles.description: Dfinity founder Dominic Williams has criticized Ethereum’s emerging ecosystem of layer-two solutions for exposing users to counterparty security risks.
